name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence
description: Substrate-neutral evidence selection contracts and deterministic reference substrates for Lachesis
author: Nicia AI

scripts.smoke: node --input-type=module -e "const api = await import('@nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence'); if (typeof api.createInMemoryGraphEvidenceSource !== 'function' || typeof api.createGraphSelectedFactsEvidenceSource !== 'function' || typeof api.createGraphSelectedAdjacencyEvidenceSource !== 'function' || typeof api.createMatchedTextEvidenceSource !== 'function' || typeof api.blindM3a1IntegrityAudit !== 'function' || typeof api.auditM3aOfflineDesign !== 'function' || typeof api.materializeM3bPhase !== 'function' || typeof api.createDeterministicM3bOracle !== 'function' || typeof api.compileM4EvidenceView !== 'function' || typeof api.reconstructM4Provenance !== 'function' || typeof api.designM4d1Power !== 'function' || typeof api.deduplicateM4d1VisibleRequests !== 'function' || typeof api.runM5EvidenceRuntime !== 'function' || typeof api.replayM5EvidenceRuntime !== 'function' || typeof api.createInMemoryM5EvidenceStore !== 'function') process.exit(1);"
